scripts.lighthouse:local: npm run build && (npx vite preview --port=4173 &) && sleep 3 && npx lighthouse http://localhost:4173 --output=json --output=html --output-path=./lighthouse-report --quiet --chrome-flags="--headless --no-sandbox --disable-gpu" && pkill -f 'vite preview' || true
scripts.lighthouse:mobile: npm run build && (npx vite preview --port=4173 &) && sleep 3 && npx lighthouse http://localhost:4173 --preset=mobile --output=json --output=html --output-path=./lighthouse-report-mobile --quiet --chrome-flags="--headless --no-sandbox --disable-gpu" && pkill -f 'vite preview' || true
scripts.lighthouse:check: node -e "const r = require('./lighthouse-report-mobile.report.json'); const p = r.categories.performance.score; const a = r.categories.accessibility.score; const t = r.audits['tap-targets'].score; console.log('Performance:', p, 'A11y:', a, 'Tap-targets:', t); if (p < 0.9 || a < 0.9 || t !== 1) process.exit(1);"
